title: Client(s) to cloud or remote server secure data or file object encryption gateway
abstract: Systems and methods to send or write data or file objects to a remote cloud storage or data server using an encryption gateway. In one embodiment, a communication system includes: an encryption gateway configured to receive TLS (or an equivalent security) encrypted data in a payload from a client application, to terminate the client TLS connection, and to extract the payload and encrypt the payload data with keys from the key manager. The encryption gateway establishes a TLS connection and inserts the encrypted-authenticated data into the TLS payload and sends or writes the TLS encrypted data to a remote cloud storage or data server for storage. The system further includes a key manager configured to provide at least one key to the encryption gateway for encryption of the data in the payload.
claims:
Claims A system, comprising: a first computing device configured as an encryption gateway, the first computing device comprising at least one processor and at least one memory, the encryption gateway configured to authenticate a client application using at least one authentication factor , to receive data in a payload from the client application, to encrypt the data, and to send or write the encrypted data to a remote cloud storage or server; and a key manager configured to provide at least one key to the encryption gateway for encryption of the data in the payload, wherein at least one key is associated to the client application or the payload, and the encryption of the data uses a remote-side transport protocol associated with the remote cloud storage or server. The system of claim 1 , wherein the remote-side transport protocol is transport layer security or Internet protocol security. The system of claim 1 , wherein the encryption gateway receives authentication information from the client application for requesting at least one key from the key manager. The system of claim 1 , wherein the encryption gateway uses symmetric encryption with authentication to encrypt the data. The system of claim 1 , wherein the key manager loads at least one key into the encryption gateway via a secure port of the first computing device or over a local-side network. The system of claim 5, wherein at least one key is associated to the client application when loaded by the key manager. 7. The system of claim 1 , wherein the key manager communicates with the remote-side transport protocol to determine at least one key for use in the encryption of the data. 8. The system of claim 7, wherein the data is encrypted at a file object level, and at least one key is associated to a file object. 9. The system of claim 1 , wherein the client application communicates with the encryption gateway using a transport connection. 10. The system of claim 1 , wherein the encryption gateway negotiates an encrypted connection to the remote cloud storage or server, and the encryption gateway negotiates an encrypted connection to the client application, the client application communicating with the encryption gateway in a client session using a transport protocol 1 1 . The system of claim 10, wherein the encryption gateway decrypts the payload from the client application, using a client session key of the client session, prior to encrypting the data using the remote-side transport protocol. 12. The system of claim 1 1 , wherein the data is encrypted by the encryption gateway using a cloud session key associated with the encrypted connection to the remote cloud storage or server. 13. The system of claim 1 , wherein the encryption gateway sets up a transport session with the remote cloud storage or server prior to receiving the payload from the client application, and the encryption gateway uses the transport session for sending or writing data from a plurality of client applications, including the client application, to the remote cloud storage or server. 14. The system of claim 13, wherein the encryption gateway modifies or inserts a header in a transport connection to associate the client application on a 

 remote connection, or the encryption gateway modifies or inserts a header in a file object to associate the client application on a remote connection. , 15. The system of claim 1 , wherein the key manager is implemented using the first computing device or a second computing device. 16. A method, comprising: receiving, by an encryption gateway from a client application, a request to read data or a file object from a remote cloud storage or server; receiving the data or the file object in a first payload from the remote cloud storage or server, wherein the data or the file object has been encrypted using a remote-side transport protocol associated with the remote cloud storage or server; decrypting, by at least one processor of the encryption gateway, the received data or the file object in the first payload using the remote-side transport protocol, wherein the decrypting uses a key of the client application and the key is retrieved from a memory; encrypting, by the encryption gateway, the first payload using a client-side transport protocol; and sending, from the encryption gateway to the client application, the encrypted first payload. 17. The method of claim 16, further comprising: terminating, by the encryption gateway, local-side communication with the client application; performing decryption on a transmission control protocol stream of data associated with an encryption algorithm and receiving data for transport encryption of a second payload that is independent of the first payload. 18. A system, comprising: at least one processor; and memory storing instructions configured to instruct at least one processor to: 

 receive, via local-side transport, data in a payload from a client application; receive, from a key manager, at least one key for encryption of the data in the payload, wherein at least one key is associated to the client application or the payload; encrypt the data in the payload, the encryption using a remote-side transport protocol associated with a remote cloud storage or server; and send or write the encrypted data to the remote cloud storage or server. 19. The system of claim 18, wherein the data is received from the client application by a multiplexer or a packet engine of an encryption gateway. 20. The system of claim 18, wherein the encrypted data is sent or written to the remote cloud storage or server by a packet engine of an encryption gateway. 21 . A method, comprising: terminating a client TLS connection; extracting data from a payload; encrypting the extracted data using an encryption key from a key manager; establishing a TLS connection to a cloud or data server; inserting the encrypted data into a TLS payload with key association information; terminating the TLS connection to the cloud or data server; and storing the encrypted payload data on memory or storage at the cloud or data server. 22. A system, comprising: a first computing device configured as an encryption gateway, the first computing device comprising at least one processor and at least one memory, the encryption gateway further configured to authenticate a client using at least one authentication factor, and to receive transport encryption data from the client; 

 wherein the encryption gateway is configured to terminate a client transport connection and extract a payload, and encrypt the payload with authentication; wherein the encryption gateway is configured to insert the encrypted- authenticated payload into a transport data packet or format for a cloud or data server, to establish a cloud or data server transport connection; wherein the cloud or data server is to terminate the transport connection, and to store the encrypted-authenticated payload in a memory or storage.
